taxonomy: Scirpodendron costatum is a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. It is commonly known as a type of grass or sedge. Scirpodendron costatum is native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and Australia. The plant is classified into the kingdom Plantae, and further divided into the superkingdom Viridiplantae, the kingdom Plantae, and the class Liliopsida. Further classification of Scirpodendron costatum includes the subclass Commelinidae, the family Poaceae, the subfamily Cyperoideae, the tribe Cyperaceae, and the genus Scirpodendron.
